summary: VeriPatch v1.3.0 is committed on staging/main with release consensus; production publish pending UAC smoke test and GitHub Actions availability.

consensus.summary: VeriPatch v1.3.0 is committed on staging/main with release consensus; production publish pending UAC smoke test and GitHub Actions availability.
blockers: Milestone exit criteria: 5/7 verified locally (UAC smoke test still manual)
GitHub Actions billing lock blocked CI/release workflow at time of tag push
next_steps: Manual smoke test: Update All with UAC on a Windows machine
Resolve GitHub Actions billing and re-run release workflow for v1.3.0
Approve production-release environment when publish job waits

agents.summary: Dispatched development-status workflow to all specialist agents.
v1.3.0 gap-closure committed on staging; release consensus v1.3.0.json present.
Parallel fan-out completed: backend-architect + devops-automator ran concurrently.
Backend architecture is stable; one-click elevation flow added for Windows UAC relaunch.
CI/CD pipelines are green locally; governance job added to workflow.
Code quality is sound; v1.3.0 committed with release consensus. Recommend manual UAC smoke before first production deploy.
Documentation and governance artifacts are comprehensive; CHANGELOG v1.3.0 published.
v1.3.0 committed with zero uncommitted files at snapshot time; production_ready=false until UAC smoke and CI release complete.

milestone.goal: Stable release v1.3.0 with gap-closure, governance policies, and mandatory quality gates
exit_criteria: All quality gates G1-G5 pass locally (compile 100%, unit 90%+, integration 100%, static analysis clean)
governance/QUALITY_GATES.md documented and enforced in CI
G1 compilation gate passes before agent commits
Engineering-lead and release-manager approval environments configured in workflows
Accessible GUI, one-click elevation, and winget headless updater verified
